title: Clinical Operations Project Manager
description:
Rome, Italy \| Full time \| Home\-based \| R1552584


  
**Clinical Operations Project Managers** are an integral part of clinical trial delivery, working closely with clinical teams and sponsors to improve patients' lives by bringing new drugs to market faster.

  

  

Within a sponsor\-dedicated **Functional Service Provider (FSP)** model, the **Clinical Operations Project Manager (COPM)** is an essential member of the core project team, responsible for the operational delivery of clinical studies at regional level.


The COPM ensures studies are conducted in accordance with contractual requirements, timelines, quality standards, and applicable regulations. This role combines hands\-on clinical operations oversight with strong project coordination and stakeholder management, with a particular focus on site\-facing activities, CRA functional leadership, and execution excellence.

  

  

**Main Responsibilities**  



  

**Study Oversight \& Delivery**
  

* Accountable for the execution of clinical trials in Italy and Greece, ensuring delivery according to timelines, budget, and quality expectations
* Monitor study progress against milestones and proactively manage risks, issues, and contingencies
* Ensure compliance with ICH\-GCP, SOPs, and applicable regulatory requirements
  

**CRA Functional Management \& Site Engagement**
  

* Provide functional oversight and guidance to assigned CRAs, ensuring high\-quality monitoring and performance
* Supervise CRA training at study level (protocol, monitoring plan, study tools, etc.)
* Accompany CRAs on key visits (e.g., SIVs, audits) as needed to support study conduct and site engagement
  

**Quality \& Compliance**
  

* Review and approve monitoring visit reports and follow\-up communications
* Ensure protocol adherence and oversee protocol deviations, root cause analyses, and CAPA implementation
* Support inspection readiness and oversee audit findings resolution
* Perform or support Study Evaluation Visits (SEVs) when required
  

**Project Coordination \& Stakeholder Management**
  

* Act as a key interface between sponsor and operational teams, ensuring alignment and transparent communication
* Collaborate cross\-functionally to support milestone achievement and resolution of study issues
  

**Planning \& Performance Management**
  

* Develop and maintain study plans and timelines, ensuring on\-time delivery
* Organize regular study follow\-up meetings with CRAs and stakeholders
* Provide structured feedback on team performance and contribute to continuous improvement


**Required Skills and Qualifications**
  

* Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences or related field

* Minimum 3\+ years as Project Manager and 5\+ years of clinical research experience


* Very good knowledge of clinical trial conduct, ICH\-GCP, and regulatory requirements


* Experience in set\-up and conduct of Early Phase – Phase I and Phase IIClinical Trials


* Therapeutic area knowledge in **Oncology** would be an advantage
* Proven experience in site management, CRA oversight, and cross\-functional coordination
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a matrix environment
* **Very good command in English language**
* Strong operational leadership and coordination capabilities
* Excellent problem\-solving and risk management skills
* Strong attention to quality, compliance, and detail
* High level of collaboration across teams, functions, and geographies


* Willingness to work at Sponsor's office in Rome for at least 3 days per week


IQVIA is a leading global provider of clinical research services, commercial insights and healthcare intelligence to the life sciences and healthcare industries. We create intelligent connections to accelerate the development and commercialization of innovative medical treatments to help improve patient outcomes and population health worldwide. Learn more at https://jobs.iqvia.com


IQVIA is committed to integrity in our hiring process and maintains a zero tolerance policy for candidate fraud. All information and credentials submitted in your application must be truthful and complete. Any false statements, misrepresentations, or material omissions during the recruitment process will result in immediate disqualification of your application, or termination of employment if discovered later, in accordance with applicable law. We appreciate your honesty and professionalism.


The potential base pay range for this role, when annualized, is 53 200,00 € \- 79 800,00 €. The actual base pay offered may vary based on a number of factors including job\-related qualifications such as knowledge, skills, education, and experience; location; and/or schedule (full or part\-time). Dependent on the position offered, incentive plans, bonuses, and/or other forms of compensation may be offered, in addition to a range of health and welfare and/or other benefits.
company_description: IQVIA (NYSE:IQV) is a leading global provider of advanced analytics, technology solutions and clinical research services to the life sciences industry dedicated to delivering actionable insights.

title: QA Deviation Specialist – Sterile Manufacturing
description:
Job description
  
  

Job description
  
  

Join our team as Quality Assurance in Latina and start a new adventure in an international and dynamic environment where you will be able to fulfil your career expectations in a fast\-growing organization.
  
  

Being a consultant at Amaris Consulting means positioning yourself as a technical and functional expert in the pharmaceutical field, but above all being an ambassador of our organization to clients thanks to: Your interpersonal skills and ability to listen in order to build a strong relationship of trust with our clients and fully understand their challenges and issues. Your curiosity and eagerness to learn as we support over 1000 clients from all sectors worldwide.
  
  

Your missions
  
  

Ensure compliance of pharmaceutical products with GMP and regulatory standards.
  
Perform document review and approval (batch records, SOPs, quality manuals).
  
Conduct deviation analysis, CAPA implementation and monitoring.
  
Support audits and regulatory inspections by preparing documentation and answering queries.
  
Collaborate with production, R\&D and supply chain teams to guarantee quality across processes.
  
Perform risk assessments and contribute to continuous improvement projects.
  
Provide training to colleagues on quality procedures and regulatory updates.
  
Prepare and present reports on quality indicators and project progress.
  
  

Your profile
  
  

Experience with Quality Assurance in the pharmaceutical industry (6 months minimum).
  
Knowledge of GMP guidelines and pharmaceutical regulatory standards.
  
Experience with root cause analysis, deviation management and CAPA processes with sterile products (mandatory).
  
**Academic background:** Master’s degree in Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Chemistry, or related field.
  
Fluent Italian and English.
  
Fully available for onsite work in Latina.
  
You have strong organizational and analytical skills with attention to detail.
  
You are able to adapt quickly, work in a team and maintain high\-quality standards.
  
  

What we offer
  
  

An international community bringing together 110\+ different nationalities.
  
**An environment where trust has a central place:** 70% of our key leaders started their careers at the first level of responsibilities.
  
A robust training system with our internal Academy and 250\+ available modules.
  
A vibrant workplace that frequently gathers for internal events (afterworks, team buildings, etc.).
  
Strong commitments to CSR notably through participation in our WeCare Together program.
  
  

Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal\-opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment. For this purpose, we welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability or other characteristics.
  
  

Who are we?
  
Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. With more than 1000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects for over a decade – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System \& Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. We’re focused on building and nurturing a top talent community where all our team members can achieve their full potential. Amaris is your steppingstone to cross rivers of change, meet challenges and achieve all your projects with success.
  
  

At Amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. We like to get to know our candidates, challenge them, and be able to give them proper feedback as quickly as possible. Here's what our recruitment process looks like:
  
  

**Brief Call:** Our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! The objective? Learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you!
  
  

Interviews (the average number of interviews is 3 \- the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). During the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your line manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. We will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. Of course, you will also get to know Amaris: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities!
  
  

**Case study:** Depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. This could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem\-solving scenario, etc.
  
  

As you know, every person is different and so is every role in a company. That is why we have to adapt accordingly, and the process may differ slightly at times. However, please know that we always put ourselves in the candidate's shoes to ensure they have the best possible experience.
  
We look forward to meeting you!

title: WW Compensation & Benefits and HR Transformation Manager
description:
### **Position**

The WW Compensation \& Benefits and HR Transformation Manager will be responsible for shaping and governing a competitive and sustainable framework for compensation, benefits, workforce planning, and HR Tech systems, aligned with the company's positioning and business strategy.  



This role will involve active collaboration with Company Business Leaders and Group HR teams to ensure a fair and competitive reward structure, while establishing a robust workforce planning approach to anticipate staffing needs, monitor performance, and optimize workforce allocation. The role will also drive HR transformation initiatives by leveraging HRIS and AI to enhance data\-driven decision\-making and organizational effectiveness.


### **Job responsibilities**

Compensation, Benefits \& Reward Implementation:


* Deliver the worldwide Compensation, Benefits \& Reward strategy, ensuring its effective global implementation.
* Define, implement, and govern global compensation and benefits frameworks, ensuring alignment with Brand values, performance culture, and Group guidelines.
* Oversee short\-term and long\-term incentive schemes for corporate and retail populations, balancing pay\-for\-performance principles with luxury culture and the Group's sustainability strategy.

Compensation Management:


* Lead the job evaluation (job weighting) methodology and the annual salary review process, ensuring consistency with Group policies, internal equity, and alignment with market benchmarks across different geographies.
* Ensure internal equity, external competitiveness, and regulatory compliance across all geographies, with a strong focus on the EU pay transparency directive.

Workforce Planning \& Retail Staffing Governance:


* Design and implement a workforce planning framework with a strong focus on Retail, enabling proactive identification of staffing needs based on business performance, seasonality, and store\-specific drivers.
* Drive the evolution of staffing models through data analytics, ensuring optimal workforce allocation and cost efficiency while preserving service excellence.

HR Information Systems (HRIS), AI and Digital Transformation:


* Drive HR transformation initiatives by leveraging HRIS and AI technologies to enhance effectiveness, transparency, and predictive decision\-making.
* Lead the digitalization of HR processes, tools, and governance models in line with Group standards and best practices.
* Act as a key interface with Group stakeholders on reward policies, HR tech evolution, benchmarking, and governance topics.
### **Profile**

* Significant experience leading Compensation \& Benefits, Workforce Planning, and HRIS activities within complex, matrixed, and international organizations.
* Strong exposure to the Retail sector and/or consumer\-facing businesses; experience in luxury is a strong asset.
Proven track record in leading technological and HR transformation projects, including HRIS and AI\-driven initiatives, in international contexts.  
* 

Skills \& Competencies:


* Strategic and analytical mindset with strong business acumen.
* Ability to connect people, numbers, and operations.
* Credibility and discretion in matrix environments.
International mindset and cultural sensitivity.  
* 

Education \& Languages:


* Master’s degree in Economics, Finance, Business Administration, or equivalent.
Fluent English required; Italian highly recommended.  
* 

LVMH is committed to non\-discrimination and respect of each person’s singularities. We recognize and recruit all types of talent


***FENDI***
**MAISON**
----------------------

The Fendi Maison was established by Adele and Edoardo Fendi in Rome in 1925\. The opening of the first Fendi boutique – a handbag shop and fur workshop followed. Soon winning international acclaim, Fendi emerged as a brand renowned for its elegance, craftsmanship, innovation and style.
  

Called by the legendary five Fendi sisters, the collaboration with the late Karl Lagerfeld began back in 1965 and lasted 54 years. In 1992, Silvia Venturini Fendi seconded him in the Artistic Direction; in 1994, she is given the direction of Accessories and later of Menswear.
  

In 2000, the LVMH group acquires Fendi becoming in 2001 its majority shareholder. Appointed in 2020, Kim Jones held the role of Artistic Director of Couture and Womenswear until 2024\. Since 2020, Delfina Delettrez Fendi, fourth generation of the Fendi family, is Artistic Director of Jewellery. Today Fendi is synonymous with quality, tradition, experimentation and creativity.

title: Plant Manager Italy- Benevento or Rome (m/f/d)
description:
**INTRODUCTION**
----------------


BIOGEST® is an international manufacturer of biomethane and biogas plants with headquarters in Austria and subsidiaries in France, Italy, Romania, Serbia, the Czech Republic, the UK and the USA. With a team of more than 90 highly qualified employees, we have already realised over 180\+ biogas plant projects that generate electricity or biomethane worldwide and thus contribute to climate protection
  

**YOUR RESPONSABILITIES**
-------------------------


* Oversee daily operation of the anaerobic digestion and upgrading systems
* Monitor biological and gas parameters
* Coordinate maintenance and manage contractors
* Ensure compliance with permits, waste traceability, and reporting
* Manage consumables, and spare parts
* Lead the plant team and ensure safe working practices
* Prepare performance reports
**YOUR PROFILE**
----------------


The ideal candidate has a solid technical background and experience in operating industrial plants, preferably within the biogas/biomethane, wastewater treatment, food processing, or energy sectors. A degree in mechanical, chemical, environmental, or industrial engineering is preferred, along with familiarity with biological processes and automated control systems.


**Technical Skills**
* Knowledge of anaerobic digestion processes and gas production dynamics
* Ability to monitor and interpret biological and gas quality parameters
* Experience with SCADA systems and digital maintenance tools
* Competence with mechanical, electrical, and pneumatic equipment (pumps, mixers, compressors, blowers, membranes, chillers)
* Understanding of preventive and corrective maintenance
* Knowledge of environmental permits, traceability, and regulatory compliance

**Soft Skills \& Leadership**


* Ability to coordinate operators and external contractors
* Strong problem\-solving attitude and readiness to act in emergencies
* High reliability, safety awareness, and sense of responsibility
* Independent working style with clear communication
* Strong organizational and planning skills

**Certifications \& Requirements**


* Knowledge of HSE procedures and risk assessment
* Valid driving license and availability for on\-call duties
* Basic IT skills (Excel, maintenance software, SCADA navigation)

**Personal Attributes**


* Proactive and hands\-on approach
* Analytical mindset with focus on process optimization
* Team\-oriented with the ability to motivate colleagues
* Commitment to continuous learning and development
* Availability to be transferred or relocated based on business needs
* Flexibility to support activities across multiple company sites

**Strong conversational English skills are essential for this role.**  

**Position is in Benevento, or in Rome**
**OUR OFFER**
-------------

  

  

We offer a stable and long\-term position within a growing biomethane company, with full support for professional development and safe plant operations.


The company provides all necessary tools, training, and resources to ensure successful performance in the role.


* **Training Provided** • Plant operation and process training • Safety courses \- SCADA and maintenance software training

* **Benefits Covered by the Company** • Competitive salary and performance\-based bonus • Paid training and professional certifications • Career development and internal growth opportunities

title: Quality Assurance & Validation Specialist – Pharma (Nord/Centro/Sud Italia)
Quality Assurance Associate
description:
**Lo.Li. Pharma International**, azienda leader nel settore nutraceutico con una forte presenza internazionale, è alla ricerca di un/una Quality Assurance Associate.

  

  

**Descrizione generale**  

Sotto la supervisione del Responsabile Qualità e Regolatorio, la risorsa fornirà supporto locale per le attività di Quality Assurance, garantendo la conformità agli standard interni ed esterni. La risorsa selezionata collaborerà alle attività tecniche legate alla Qualità sull'intero portafoglio prodotti di Lo.Li. Pharma International, supportando le diverse fasi del ciclo di vita del prodotto.

  

**Principali responsabilità**  

In accordo con il Responsabile Qualità e Regolatorio provvede ad effettuare le seguenti attività:
* Mantiene e migliora i processi di qualità esistenti per garantire un funzionamento sempre adeguato/completo dei processi di qualità.
* Lavora a stretto contatto con gli altri reparti per garantire la conformità agli attuali sistemi di change control, CAPA, non conformità, reclami, follow\-up delle osservazioni degli audit interni.
* Svolge indagini su non conformità e reclami sulla qualità dei prodotti.
* Contribuisce allo sviluppo di piani di azioni correttive e preventive e monitora l’attuazione delle stesse entro un determinato lasso di tempo.
* Aggiorna, mantiene e migliora i documenti di processo e la documentazione del sistema di gestione della qualità in conformità ai requisiti ISO e GMP.
* Esegue analisi dei dati, prepara trend di qualità e riferisce i risultati alle parti interessate.
* Documenta le attività di assicurazione qualità garantendo l’adempimento agli standard qualitativi aziendali mediante l’esecuzione di audit interni.
* Segue gli studi di stabilità dei prodotti in accordo alle indicazioni e ai protocolli definiti con il Responsabile;
* Definisce e revisiona gli aspetti qualitativi dei prodotti con i clienti e con i produttori e valuta la conformità degli stessi nei prodotti di riferimento;
* Definisce e revisiona i Quality Agreement e le Specifiche tecniche dei prodotti nei contratti con i clienti;
* Collabora con i siti produttivi e con le figure responsabili della Lo.Li. Pharma Italia per l’ottenimento della documentazione attinente alla qualità dei prodotti (schede tecniche prodotto finito, draft CoA, ST materie prime, materiale di packaging ecc) e si occupa del corretto salvataggio di tutta la documentazione in accordo con le indicazioni ricevute dal Responsabile Qualità e Regolatorio;
* Riceve e verifica tutta la documentazione di qualità necessaria per il rilascio dei prodotti sul mercato (CoA, CoC, contro\-campioni, batch release, batch record ecc), condividendola con i colleghi interessati;
* Verifica e gestisce le segnalazioni ricevute dai clienti e/o assegnatoli dal Responsabile, interfacciandosi con i clienti e i produttori; prepara i report di non\-conformità/deviazione/reclamo/change control da condividere con il cliente dopo approvazione del Responsabile e salva tutta la documentazione relativa in accordo con le indicazioni del Responsabile;
* Supporta il Responsabile Qualità e Regolatorio nella stesura delle procedure relative alla propria area di competenza o delle altre aree aziendali garantendo aderenza ai principi della ISO 9001 e ai requisiti GMP.
* Supporta le aree interne ed i clienti internazionali negli aspetti di Qualità.
* Revisiona e presenta mediante report mensili al Responsabile Qualità e Regolatorio lo stato di avanzamento delle attività di Assicurazione Qualità.
* Ulteriori compiti di volta in volta dovuti a esigenze aziendali o di reparto su input del Responsabile Qualità e Regolatorio.


  

**Requisiti**
* Laurea in discipline scientifiche
* Ottimo livello di inglese (scritto e parlato)
* Costituisce titolo preferenziale una precedente esperienza in Quality Assurance nel settore farmaceutico/nutraceutico
* Capacità di lavorare efficacemente in un contesto operativo dinamico
* Spiccate doti relazionali e attitudine alla collaborazione
* Ottime capacità organizzative
* Efficaci capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale


  

**Luogo di lavoro**: Roma, Via Tiburtina n. 912  

  

**Tipo contratto**: a tempo indeterminato, 2° livello CCNL Terziario Distribuzione e Servizi (Confcommercio), RAL 30\.000–34\.000 in funzione dell'esperienza, buoni pasto da 8 euro.  

  

**Cosa offriamo**
* Un ambiente di lavoro dinamico e internazionale
* Opportunità di crescita e formazione continua
* Un team coeso e orientato alla qualità

  

  

Se sei una persona motivata, attenta ai dettagli e appassionata della qualità, inviaci la tua candidatura!

=====================

**Pharma Services Group (PSG) – Drug Product Division**
-------------------------------------------------------

### **Location: Ferentino, Italy site**


At Thermo Fisher Scientific, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life every day to enable our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer.


We provide our teams with the resources, leadership, and opportunities needed to achieve their career goals while helping to take science a step beyond. From accelerating drug development to supporting life\-changing therapies, our work directly impacts patients worldwide.

**The Opportunity**
-------------------


We are seeking an experienced and strategic **Director of Quality** to join our Pharma Services Group (PSG) Drug Product Division at our Ferentino manufacturing site.


As a key member of the Site Leadership Team, you will provide leadership and direction for Quality Operations, Compliance \& Batch Release activities. You will ensure the highest standards of product quality, regulatory compliance, and inspection readiness while supporting the continued growth of one of Thermo Fisher Scientific’s most important pharmaceutical manufacturing sites.


This role offers the opportunity to partner closely with customers, regulatory authorities, corporate quality leadership, and operational teams to drive a culture of quality excellence, continuous improvement, and operational performance.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

### **Quality Leadership \& Compliance**

* Provide strategic leadership for Quality Operations, Compliance \& Batch Release,
* Ensure ongoing compliance with cGMP, FDA, EMA, MHRA, and other applicable regulatory requirements.
* Maintain a state of inspection readiness and successfully lead regulatory inspections and customer audits.
* Act as the primary quality representative for critical compliance matters and quality\-related business decisions.

### **Quality Operations \& Product Release**

* Ensure timely disposition and release of products through effective management of quality systems and batch certification processes.
* Provide oversight of investigations, deviations, CAPAs, change controls, complaints, and risk management activities.
* Support Qualified Person (QP) activities and ensure robust product lifecycle quality oversight.
* Drive effective quality review and escalation processes to proactively identify and mitigate risk.

### **Customer \& Regulatory Engagement**

* Serve as a trusted quality partner to customers, regulatory agencies, and corporate stakeholders.
* Lead customer quality governance meetings and manage quality agreements.
* Support regulatory submissions, inspections, and responses to regulatory observations.
* Provide strategic guidance during customer onboarding, technology transfers, and commercial product launches.

### **Continuous Improvement \& Operational Excellence**

* Drive continuous improvement initiatives across manufacturing, laboratory, and supply chain operations.
* Utilize quality metrics and performance indicators to identify trends and opportunities for improvement.
* Champion quality culture, digital transformation initiatives, and operational excellence programs.
* Promote proactive risk management and data\-driven decision making throughout the organization.

### **Leadership \& Talent Development**

* Lead, coach, and develop high\-performing quality teams.
* Build organizational capability through succession planning, talent development, and employee engagement.
* Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous learning.
* Partner effectively across Operations, Technical Services, Supply Chain, Engineering, and Corporate Quality functions.

**Minimum Qualifications**
--------------------------

* Advanced Degree with 6\+ years of experience, or Bachelor’s Degree with 8\+ years of experience in a regulated pharmaceutical, medical device, biologics, diagnostics, or related industry.
* Degree in Life Sciences, Engineering, Chemistry, Pharmacy, or related scientific discipline.
* Minimum 5 years of leadership experience within Quality organizations.
* Strong working knowledge of cGMP requirements, FDA regulations, EU GMP guidelines, and global quality standards.
* Proven experience leading regulatory inspections and customer audits.
* Demonstrated expertise in Quality Systems, CAPA, investigations, change control, risk management, and batch disposition.
* Experience managing customer relationships and quality agreements.
* Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* Demonstrated ability to lead organizational change and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Project management, financial planning, and resource management experience.

**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------

* Qualified Person (QP) certification or eligibility preferred.
* Professional certifications such as ASQ, RAPS, or equivalent.
* Experience within CDMO and contract manufacturing environments.
* Experience supporting global customer portfolios and complex supply chains.
* Knowledge of digital quality systems and quality management software platforms.
* Experience working within matrix and multi\-site organizations.

**Leadership Competencies**
---------------------------

* Sets strategic direction and translates vision into execution.
* Builds and develops high\-performing teams.
* Creates a culture of quality, compliance, and accountability.
* Influences effectively across functions, customers, and global stakeholders.
* Drives innovation, operational excellence, and continuous improvement.
* Demonstrates strong business acumen and decision\-making capability.

**Travel**
----------

* Up to 30% domestic and international travel may be required.

title: Specialista Analisi di Esercizio Categorie Protette (L. 68/99)
description:
Direzione: Strategie di Svilup. Rete e Dispacciam.
Località lavoro: Roma, Lazio, 00138
Terna, gestore della rete di trasmissione nazionale (RTN), è impegnata nel processo di transizione ecologica e come regista del sistema elettrico e abilitatore della **Twin Transition** (transizione energetica e innovazione digitale), ha il compito di sviluppare una rete in grado di gestire una sempre migliore integrazione delle rinnovabili e consentire la progressiva decarbonizzazione del sistema, garantendo al contempo il costante bilanciamento tra energia prodotta e consumata.



Vuoi essere protagonista della transizione energetica e vuoi dare il tuo contributo per la costruzione del sistema energetico di domani?



Terna, nell’area del Dispacciamento, è alla ricerca di persone appartenenti alle Categorie Protette e iscritte e iscrivibili alle Liste di Collocamento Mirato Legge 68/99 da inserire nel ruolo di **Specialista Analisi di Esercizio Categorie Protette (L. 68/99\)** per la sede di **Roma**

  


**Attività**

  



La figura contribuirà ad effettuare l'Analisi Preventivo Consuntivo (APC) volta a:

  


* identificare le cause tecniche degli scostamenti tecnici ed economici tra previsioni e consuntivi;
* monitorare le performance del rispetto dei limiti di tensione e di corrente;
* analizzare comportamento del SEN nel suo complesso e degli elementi di rete ai fini dell'economia e della sicurezza;
* individuando possibili azioni di miglioramento a livello di processi e strumenti a supporto dell'esercizio del SEN.
* La risorsa sarà coinvolta nella stesura del rapporto annuale di consuntivo sullo stato di funzionamento del SEN e nell'analisi dei possibili scenari di evoluzione dell'assetto del SEN e dei potenziali impatti sull'esercizio.
* La risorsa parteciperà alla definizione dei criteri per la Riaccensione e la Rialimentazione del SEN, contribuirà all'emissione del relativo Piano e alla definizione il piano annuale delle prove.

  



Le attività nello specifico saranno:

  


* Analisi bilanci energetici e scostamenti previsioni FER e fabbisogno;
* Verifiche sicurezza statica/dinamica e calcoli di rete;
* Analisi corto circuito ed eventi di rete;
* Ottimizzazione assetti e modulazioni FER;
* Definizione e supporto piani di rialimentazione e riaccensione.
  


**Requisiti**
-------------


* Laurea Magistrale in Ingegneria Elettrica/Ingegneria Energetica
* Esperienza da 1 a 3 anni
* Conoscenza della Lingua inglese livello B1 minimo richiesto
* Disponibilità a trasferte nazionali e internazionali
* Capacità di lavorare in team e per progetto

  



**Condizioni contrattuali**


* Tipologia contrattuale: lavoro subordinato Tempo Indeterminato
* CCNL applicato: Settore elettrico
* Categoria: Impiegato

  


**Informazioni retributive**



In conformità all’art. 5, comma 1, del D.Lgs. 96/2026, la Società rende note le informazioni relative alla retribuzione iniziale prevista per la posizione.



La retribuzione annua lorda iniziale (RAL), non inferiore a € 41\.967,69, è determinata in funzione del livello di responsabilità e delle competenze richieste, secondo criteri oggettivi, verificabili e neutrali sotto il profilo del genere e in coerenza con il CCNL applicato.



Eventuali riconoscimenti economici superiori rispetto alla soglia minima indicata sono attribuiti esclusivamente sulla base di elementi ulteriori, oggettivamente riscontrabili, quali, a titolo esemplificativo:


* esperienza professionale rilevante e qualificata;
* specifiche competenze tecniche o manageriali;
* livello di autonomia e responsabilità effettivamente richiesto dal ruolo.


Tali elementi sono applicati secondo criteri trasparenti e non discriminatori, nel rispetto del principio di parità di retribuzione per lavoro uguale o di pari valore.

  



Per chi lavora con noi:



**Salute e futuro** – Assicurazione sanitaria e piano di previdenza complementare per prenderci cura delle nostre persone e delle loro famiglie nel tempo.



**Formazione e sviluppo** – Programmi di training strutturati e formazione continua, con particolare attenzione alla sicurezza, alle competenze tecniche e allo sviluppo professionale.



**Internal Mobility** – Opportunità di sviluppo e percorsi di evoluzione professionale nel Gruppo.


* ️ **Benessere e work\-life balance** – Iniziative di welfare aziendale a supporto dell’equilibrio tra vita privata e professionale.



**Vantaggi esclusiv**i – Un sistema di convenzioni e agevolazioni dedicate, pensato per le esigenze quotidiane delle nostre persone (ristorazione, trasporti, sport, cultura).



**Onboarding “Destinazione Terna”** – Percorso di inserimento ingaggiante, con formazione, affiancamento operativo e conoscenza diretta dei siti e delle attività sul campo.

  



È possibile candidarsi entro e non oltre il 9 luglio cliccando su “Candidati ora”. Referente per la selezione: Simona Sapio \- talentacquisition@terna.it


*Ricordiamo che i CV inviati tramite e\-mail non verranno presi in considerazione. Le persone considerate in linea con il profilo saranno contattate nelle prossime settimane. Ringraziamo chi ha inviato la candidatura e per l’interesse dimostrato verso il nostro Gruppo.*  

*Confermiamo che tutte le candidature saranno tenute in considerazione per eventuali future opportunità professionali.*

description:

Vuoi iniziare una nuova avventura professionale come Sviluppatore Software Embedded in una delle nostre opportunità nel settore Aerospace \& Defence a Roma?
  
  

Cosa farai?
  
Sviluppare e mantenere software embedded in ambiente Linux.
  
Implementare funzionalità e ottimizzare componenti software in C/C\+\+.
  
Realizzare script Bash per automazione e gestione delle attività di sviluppo.
  
Collaborare con team multidisciplinari per integrazione e validazione delle soluzioni.
  
Supportare le attività di debugging e troubleshooting del software.

Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria Informatica o esperienza equivalente.
  
Esperienza di almeno 1\-2 anni nello sviluppo software embedded.
  
Conoscenza di C/C\+\+, Bash e ambiente Linux.
  
Conoscenza della lingua italiana a livello C1/C2 e dell'inglese a livello B2\.
  
Capacità di lavorare in team e di adattarsi a un ambiente dinamico.
  
  

**Nice to have:**  

Gradita esperienza nel settore Aerospace \& Defence.
  
Familiarità con sistemi embedded real\-time e attività di integrazione software.
  
✨ Che cosa offriamo?
  
Una comunità internazionale che riunisce oltre 110 nazionalità diverse.
  
Un ambiente in cui la fiducia è centrale e la crescita interna è valorizzata.
  
Un solido sistema di formazione con Academy interna e moduli disponibili.
  
Un ambiente di lavoro dinamico con eventi interni (afterwork, team building, ecc.).
  
Un forte impegno verso benessere e work\-life balance.
  
  

**Benefici locali in Italia:**  

Buoni pasto.
  
Opzioni di lavoro flessibili secondo policy aziendale.
  
Assicurazione sanitaria e programmi di benessere, ove applicabili.
  
Remunerazione e trasparenza
  
**Gross Annual Salary Range:** EUR 24\.000 – EUR 36\.000
  
CCNL del Commercio
  
La fascia retributiva è definita secondo criteri oggettivi e neutri rispetto al genere.
  
Durante il processo di selezione non chiederemo informazioni sulla tua retribuzione attuale o precedente.
  
  

Le nostre fasce retributive sono volutamente ampie, perché cerchiamo persone di talento, non “profili standard”. Uno stesso ruolo può attrarre candidature molto diverse tra loro, e crediamo sia importante lasciare spazio a questa varietà. La collocazione all’interno della fascia dipenderà dalla tua esperienza specifica, dalle tue competenze e da ciò che potrai portare nel ruolo.
  
  

**La persona ideale si riconosce in questi valori:**  

**Boldness:** il nostro spirito di avventura imprenditoriale è ciò che ci unisce tutti e ci porta al successo.
  
  

**Trust:** la fiducia è il fondamento di tutte le relazioni, la fiducia ci consente di promuovere la libertà di espressione, creatività e innovazione.
  
  

**Performance:** questo si traduce in un desiderio costante di andare avanti e non smettere mai di chiedere di più a noi stessi.
  
  

**Commitment:** non ci limitiamo a rispettare i nostri impegni e lavoriamo duramente per ottenere grandi risultati.
  
  

**Independence:** Amaris Consulting appartiene a chi l'ha creata e a chi la sviluppa ogni giorno.
  
  

Candidandoti per questa posizione, potresti avere l'opportunità di entrare a far parte di un'azienda che supporta i propri partner nei settori Automotive \& Motorsport, Avionic \& Aerospace, Difesa, Railway, Industrial, Domotica e Robotica, con attività di ingegneria meccanica ed elettronica nelle aree Development \& Design, Testing \& Validation, System Engineering, R\&D e Project Management.
  
  

Diversità e Inclusione
  
  

Amaris Consulting promuove pari opportunità e valuta le candidature sulla base di competenze, esperienza e potenziale. Accogliamo candidature qualificate senza discriminazioni legate a genere, identità o espressione di genere, orientamento sessuale, origine etnica, nazionalità, religione o convinzioni personali, età, disabilità, stato civile o familiare, o altre caratteristiche protette.
  
  

Se hai bisogno di adattamenti ragionevoli durante il processo di selezione, comunicacelo: faremo il possibile per supportarti.
  
  

Who are we?
  
Amaris Consulting è una società di consulenza tecnologica indipendente che accompagna e fornisce soluzioni alle imprese.
  
Riunisce più di 7\.500 persone distribuite in 5 continenti e oltre 60 paesi. Con oltre 1\.000 clienti in tutto il mondo, implementiamo soluzioni per grandi progetti da oltre un decennio.
  
I nostri esperti coprono tutti i settori, dai servizi finanziari ai trasporti, dalla sanità alla tecnologia.
  
Amaris è la “stepping stone” che consente di attraversare il guado, il trampolino che permette di proiettarti verso i tuoi obiettivi, affrontare le sfide e realizzare con successo tutti i tuoi progetti.

Clean Utilites & Sustainability Internship
description:
**Clean Utilites \& Sustainability** **I****nternship**

**Anagni (Frosinone), Italy**

**About the job**


Vuoi iniziare la tua carriera nel mondo HealthCare? Unisciti a **Sanofi** e avrai l’opportunità di crescere e sviluppare le tue competenze sotto il coordinamento di stimolanti colleghi, contribuendo a fare la differenza nella vita di migliaia di persone in tutto il mondo. Come tirocinante all’interno del reparto di **Clean Utilites \& Sustainability**, avrai l’opportunità di imparare attività del ruolo, sviluppare nuove capacità, potrai contribuire a lavoro di team in un ambiente stimolante e collaborativo, inoltre avrai l’opportunità di una crescita professionale e formazione continua.


Siamo un'azienda della salute, innovativa e globale, e siamo guidati da uno scopo: **sfidare i confini della scienza per migliorare la vita delle persone.** Lavorare in Sanofi significa appassionarsi al proprio lavoro, crescere di giorno in giorno esplorando tra innumerevoli opportunità, costruire stimolanti relazioni e superare i limiti di ciò che pensavi fosse possibile. *Ready to get started?*

**Le attività che seguirai con il tuo team**

* Supporterai il mantenimento e l'implementazione del **Sistema di Gestione dell’Energia** (ISO 50001\), contribuendo al monitoraggio dei consumi, **KPI energetici** e **azioni di miglioramento** in ambito energia e sostenibilità.
* Parteciperai a progetti di **digitalizzazione e Intelligenza Artificiale** per il monitoraggio e l’ottimizzazione delle **prestazioni energetiche** degli impianti, nonché a progetti legati allo sviluppo di applicazioni volte a ridurre l'impatto ambientale dei dipendenti dello stabilimento.
* Affiancherai il team Clean Utilities nelle attività **operative**, di **manutenzione** preventiva/predittiva e nella **gestione documentale** degli impianti.
* Collaborerai a **studi di fattibilità** e **progetti di investimento** per il miglioramento dell’**efficienza energetica**

**Chi cerchiamo**

* Laurea in Ingegneria **Industriale, Meccanica, Chimica o Energetica**
* Buona conoscenza **dell’inglese** (Livello B2\)
* Interesse per i temi di **sostenibilità**, **energia** e **Intelligenza Artificiale**
* Motivazione a operare in un contesto **multinazionale e tecnologicamente avanzato**
* Capacità di comprensione dei **sistemi impiantistici compless**i (plus)
* Conoscenza di **Pacchetto Office** e piattaforme di Intelligenza Artificiale e AutoCAD(plus)
* **Automunito**/a (il sito produttivo è raggiungibile solo con mezzi propri)

**Perché Sanofi?**

* Dai vita ai miracoli della scienza entrando a far parte di un team coinvolgente e orientato al futuro
* Inizia il tuo percorso professionale sotto il coordinamento di un **tutor qualificato** che stimolerà la tua **crescita professionale** e ti aiuterà a muovere i tuoi primi passi nel mondo del lavoro
* Lo stage è svolto in **presenza**
* Ti offriamo un’opportunità di **tirocinio di 6 mesi**. È previsto un rimborso spese e accesso gratuito alla mensa aziendale.


\#Onsite


\#EarlyTalent

title: Data Maintenance Specialist
description:
ITA Airways, la Compagnia di bandiera italiana sta assumendo!


Abbiamo bisogno di portare a bordo persone qualificate, motivate e con la voglia di mettersi in gioco con passione e iniziativa.


In ambito Operations Control Center, per la funzione Integrated Solutions selezioniamo un/una:  



**Data Maintenance Specialist**

Scopo del ruolo è quello di garantire la supervisione ed il corretto aggiornamento dei sistemi operativi di Operations Control Center e delle banche dati relative per tutti gli aspetti di business facendo da interfaccia tra l’Operations Control Center, le linee operative e la struttura di Information Technology, garantendo l'indirizzamento e la risoluzione delle problematiche emergenti.


**Di cosa ti occuperai?**
-------------------------

* Supportare nell’attività di certificazione e consolidamento dei dati operativi di volo in continuo contatto con il Coordinamento di Rete, l’Hub di Fiumicino, gli scali periferici, ed ogni altro ente coinvolto alla gestione dei voli per ottenere che tutte le realtà aziendali, e soprattutto tutti i sistemi, siano sempre sincronizzati ed aggiornati.
* Contribuire ad assicurare il corretto e completo aggiornamento e gestione delle banche dati di riferimento dei sistemi di gestione operativa, garantendo l’allineamento tra tutti i sistemi in uso nell’area Operations Control Center.
* Supportare nella risoluzione delle criticità legate ai sistemi, emergenti durante lo svolgimento delle Operazioni, attivando ed implementando piani di recovery e fall back in caso di distruption legate ai sistemi.
* Fornire supporto agli utenti dislocati presso gli scali del Network per i sistemi di propria competenza.
* Contribuire all’individuazione di opportunità di ulteriore automazione dei processi allo scopo di ridurre le attività manuali.
* Supportare nell’individuazione delle cause di criticità impattanti trasversalmente sulle aree coinvolte nei processi operativi, proponendo le opportune azioni correttive.
* Assicurare, in sede di contestazione, l’individuazione dei codici dei ritardi attraverso l'analisi degli eventi operativi accaduti interfacciandosi, ove necessario, con le funzioni aziendali coinvolte.
**Cosa stiamo cercando?**
-------------------------

* Requisito minimo diploma in materie tecnico aeronautico o indirizzo informatico, la laurea costituirà elemento preferenziale.
* Ottima conoscenza dei pacchetti informatici Office con particolare riguardo Microsoft Excel e Vba.
* Esperienza con i sistemi di gestione operativa dei voli e\-Business Object costituiscono un titolo preferenziale.
* Ottima padronanza scritta e parlata della lingua inglese (minimo livello B2, preferibilmente C1\).
* Esperienza maturata nel settore aereo o nell’Operations Control Center costituisce titolo preferenziale
**Competenze**
--------------

* Spiccata capacità di problem solving.
* Rapidità di pianificazione ed esecuzione.
* Forte orientamento al risultato.
* Capacità di ragionamento deduttivo.
* Orientamento al cliente interno ed esterno.
* Ottima capacità relazionale e di comunicazione.
* Spiccata attitudine al Team working.
* Capacità di coordinamento, organizzazione e rispetto delle procedure e metodologie di lavoro.
* Capacità di innovazione e spirito d’iniziativa.
* Spiccata capacità di agire in autonomia nell’ambito dei compiti assegnati.
**Cosa offriamo?**
------------------

Contratto CCNL Trasporto Aereo su turni h24 e 7/7\.


RAL: €24\.000 lordi annui. L’offerta retributiva sarà commisurata all’esperienza e alle competenze del candidato/a.


**Dove lavorerai?**
-------------------

Fiumicino, Roma  



Se ti riconosci in queste caratteristiche, aspettiamo la tua candidatura!  



*Si invitano i candidati a prendere visione dell’informativa che ITA ha predisposto conformemente a quanto previsto dal Regolamento (UE) n. 679/2016 e dal D.lgs. N 196/2003, nella pagina “Lavora con noi” del sito* *www.ita\-airways.com* *. Le offerte si intendono rivolte a persone di entrambi i sessi (L.903/77\).*

title: Esperto Diritto Tributario
description:
Per favorire la crescita professionale, Alma Laboris Business School propone il **Percorso per** E**sperti in Diritto e Tecniche Tributarie (in Aula oppure Online \- Live Streaming)** per un approccio Executive a Fiscalità, Tributi, Accertamento e Contenzioso con l’obiettivo di:


* Fornire **Conoscenze Tecniche**, attraverso l’esame di numerosi casi aziendali, esercitazioni pratiche e la presenza di Esperti del settore;
* Costruire **Opportunità di Carriera,** con il supporto gratuito di Consulenti qualificati;


**Le principali Materie trattate nel Percorso in formula week\-end:**


* La Tassazione delle Persone Fisiche e delle Società di Persone
* Imposte Indirette e Fiscalita’ dei Patrimoni e dei Trust
* Il Bilancio di Esercizio ed il Sistema di Tassazione delle Società di Capitali
* Fiscalità Straordinaria di Impresa
* Fiscalità dei Gruppi Societari
* Attività Ispettiva, di Controllo e di Accertamento del Tributo
* Il Processo Tributario
* La Riscossione Tributaria e le Sanzioni Amministrative Tributarie
* Istituti Preventivi e Deflattivi del Contenzioso Tributario
* Diritto Tributario Comunitario
* Iva Nazionale
* Scambi Internazionali, Iva e Dogane
* Diritto Tributario Internazionale
* Diritto Penale Tributario e Legislazione Antiriciclaggio


**Opportunità di Carriera:**



Alma Laboris, già durante il Percorso, propone per ogni singolo Partecipante:

title: Presales Engineer | Aerospace
description:
Job description
  
  

Vuoi iniziare una nuova avventura professionale come Pre\-Sales Engineer – Defence \& Telco Technologies in una delle nostre opportunità nel settore Telecommunications \& Defense a Roma?
  
  

Cosa farai?
  
* Gestire attività di pre\-sales per soluzioni tecnologiche in ambito difesa, con focus su tecnologie delle telecomunicazioni (es. impianti di videosorveglianza, anti\-intrusione, radar, antenne).
* Analizzare tender e documentazione di gara, valutando la fattibilità tecnica ed economica della partecipazione.
* Identificare e confrontare fornitori e componenti hardware (es. radar, antenne, apparati telco) per costruire la migliore soluzione tecnico\-economica.
* Collaborare con il team Sales nella definizione della strategia di offerta e nella preparazione della documentazione di gara.
* Redigere l’offerta tecnica e contribuire alla stesura della proposta complessiva per l’aggiudicazione delle gare.
* Interfacciarti con stakeholder interni (sales, tecnico, procurement) per allineare requisiti cliente, vincoli tecnici e budget.
* Supportare presentazioni tecniche verso il cliente in fase di pre\-vendita, quando richiesto.
* Contribuire al miglioramento continuo dei processi e delle best practice pre\-sales in ambito difesa/telco.


✍️ Cosa richiediamo?
  
* Laurea in Ingegneria delle Telecomunicazioni, Elettronica o discipline affini, o esperienza equivalente.
* Almeno 3 anni di esperienza come Pre\-Sales Engineer nel settore difesa, preferibilmente su tecnologie telco (videosorveglianza, anti\-intrusione, radar, antenne, reti di comunicazione).
* Solida conoscenza del contesto telco e delle principali tecnologie di telecomunicazione applicate alla difesa.
* Esperienza concreta nella gestione di tender/gare: analisi requisiti, valutazione fattibilità, definizione offerta tecnica.
* Conoscenza della lingua italiana fluente e inglese almeno a livello B1/B2\.


**Nice to have:**  

* Esperienza di interfaccia con clienti istituzionali o grandi player del settore difesa.
* Familiarità con processi di procurement pubblico e normative di settore.
* Buone capacità di comunicazione, negoziazione e lavoro in team cross\-funzionali.


✨ Che cosa offriamo?
  
* Una comunità internazionale che riunisce oltre 110 nazionalità diverse.
* Un ambiente in cui la fiducia è centrale e la crescita interna è valorizzata.
* Un solido sistema di formazione con Academy interna e oltre 250 moduli disponibili.
* Un ambiente di lavoro vivace con eventi interni (afterwork, team building, ecc.).
* Un forte impegno nella CSR, in particolare attraverso la partecipazione al nostro programma WeCare Together.


**Benefici locali in Italia:**  

* Buoni pasto.
* Programma di welfare con sconti e vantaggi per le persone dipendenti.
* Opzioni di lavoro flessibili secondo policy aziendale (politica di lavoro ibrido, ove compatibile con il progetto).
* Assicurazione sanitaria e programmi di benessere, ove applicabili.


Remunerazione e trasparenza
  
* Gross Annual Salary Range / RAL iniziale fissa: EUR 24\.000 – EUR 36\.000\.
* CCNL del Commercio.
* La fascia retributiva è definita secondo criteri oggettivi e neutri rispetto al genere.
* Componente variabile: eventuali premi discrezionali non garantiti non inclusi nella RAL indicata.
* Durante il processo di selezione non chiederemo informazioni sulla tua retribuzione attuale o precedente.


Le nostre fasce retributive sono volutamente ampie, perché cerchiamo persone di talento, non “profili standard”. Uno stesso ruolo può attrarre candidature molto diverse tra loro, e crediamo sia importante lasciare spazio a questa varietà. La collocazione all’interno della fascia dipenderà dalla tua esperienza specifica, dalle tue competenze e da ciò che potrai portare nel ruolo.
  
  

**La persona ideale si riconosce in questi valori:**  

**Boldness:** il nostro spirito di avventura imprenditoriale è ciò che ci unisce tutti e ci porta al successo.
  
**Trust:** la fiducia è il fondamento di tutte le relazioni, la fiducia ci consente di promuovere la libertà di espressione, creatività e innovazione.
  
**Performance:** questo si traduce in un desiderio costante di andare avanti e non smettere mai di chiedere di più a noi stessi.
  
**Commitment:** non ci limitiamo a rispettare i nostri impegni e lavoriamo duramente per ottenere grandi risultati.
  
**Independence:** Amaris Consulting appartiene a chi l'ha creata e a chi la sviluppa ogni giorno.
  
  

Candidandoti per questa posizione, potresti avere l’opportunità di entrare a far parte di un’azienda che supporta i propri partner nei settori Defence, Telco, Automotive \& Motorsport, Avionic \& Aerospace, Railway, Industrial, Domotica e Robotica, con attività di ingegneria e consulenza nelle aree Development \& Design, Testing \& Validation, System Engineering, R\&D e Project Management.
  
  

Diversità e Inclusione
  
Amaris Consulting promuove pari opportunità e valuta le candidature sulla base di competenze, esperienza e potenziale. Accogliamo candidature qualificate senza discriminazioni legate a genere, identità o espressione di genere, orientamento sessuale, origine etnica, nazionalità, religione o convinzioni personali, età, disabilità, stato civile o familiare, o altre caratteristiche protette.
  
  

Se hai bisogno di adattamenti ragionevoli durante il processo di selezione, comunicacelo: faremo il possibile per supportarti.
  
  

Who are we?
  
Amaris Consulting è una società di consulenza tecnologica indipendente che accompagna e fornisce soluzioni alle imprese.
  
Riunisce più di 7\.500 persone distribuite in 5 continenti e oltre 60 paesi. Con oltre 1\.000 clienti in tutto il mondo, implementiamo soluzioni per grandi progetti da oltre un decennio.
  
I nostri esperti coprono tutti i settori, dai servizi finanziari ai trasporti, dalla sanità alla tecnologia.
  
Amaris è la “stepping stone” che consente di attraversare il guado, il trampolino che permette di proiettarti verso i tuoi obiettivi, affrontare le sfide e realizzare con successo tutti i tuoi progetti.

title: Nature Principal Consultant
description:
### **Description**

  

We are seeking a highly motivated **Principal Consultant** with deep subject matter expertise in nature\-related dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities (**DIROs**). In this role, you will provide technical leadership and strategic insight to Anthesis clients across a wide array of sectors.  

Your core mission will be to lead and deliver strategic client engagements while driving business development efforts, helping organizations assess and effectively respond to nature\-related risks and opportunities.### **Key Responsibilities**

 **Technical Leadership – Nature Frameworks \& DIROs*** **Act as a subject matter expert** in nature\-related DIRO assessments, applying TNFD\-aligned methodologies to identify, assess, and prioritize nature\-related risks and opportunities.
* **Provide technical leadership** on **ESRS E4** (Biodiversity \& Ecosystems), supporting clients in meeting **CSRD** disclosure requirements, including double materiality, metrics, and transition plans.
* **Guide clients** in **SBTN** target setting, including scoping, baseline development, and alignment with *no conversion of natural ecosystems* and *freshwater targets*.
* **Lead the implementation of EUDR regulations**, assisting clients in interpreting and operationalizing requirements such as due diligence systems, traceability, geolocation, and risk assessments.
* **Ensure consistency** with leading guidance, including **AFi**, the **TNFD LEAP** approach, and emerging best practices in nature\-related financial risk management.

**Project Management \& Delivery of Client Projects*** **Lead and deliver** nature\-related assessments (DIRO, footprinting, baselining) and translate outputs into clear priorities, action plans, and transition strategies.
* **Support clients** in embedding nature into enterprise risk management, strategy, and disclosures, including integration with climate, supply chain, and financial decision\-making.
* **Provide technical oversight** and quality assurance across complex, multi\-workstream engagements.
* **Develop high\-quality deliverables**, including TNFD\-aligned reports, ESRS disclosures, and executive\-ready insights.

**Strategic Advisory \& Implementation*** **Advise clients** on operationalizing nature strategies, moving seamlessly from commitments and disclosure to implementation across value chains.
* **Support the development** of nature transition plans, including governance, KPIs, and monitoring frameworks.
* **Translate technical findings** into commercially relevant insights, articulating the business case for action on nature (risk mitigation, resilience, and growth opportunities).

**Methodology \& Offering Development*** **Lead the development and refinement** of Anthesis’ methodologies and tools for DIRO assessments, TNFD alignment, and EUDR/ESRS compliance.
* **Contribute to internal knowledge development**, ensuring Anthesis remains at the forefront of evolving nature frameworks and regulations.
* **Develop reusable assets**, templates, and training materials to scale delivery quality globally.
* **Partner with digital teams** to advance and scale our digital\-based offerings.

**Client \& Business Development*** **Build trusted relationships** with senior client stakeholders, acting as a strategic advisor on nature\-related topics.
* **Lead or support proposal development** for opportunities related to EUDR, TNFD, SBTN, ESRS/CSRD, and nature strategy.
* **Identify opportunities** to expand client engagements from diagnostics (DIRO) to full implementation (targets, transition plans, and transformation).

**Developing \& Strengthening Team Expertise*** **Mentor and coach** consultants, building internal capability on TNFD, SBTN, ESRS, EUDR, and DIRO methodologies.
* **Deliver internal and external training** on nature\-related frameworks and best practices.
* **Contribute thought leadership** to strengthen Anthesis’ market positioning in nature advisory.

  

### **Skills, Knowledge \& Expertise**

 **Technical Expertise \& Frameworks*** **8\+ years of experience** in nature, biodiversity, natural capital, or ecosystem services.
* **Demonstrated expertise** in nature\-related **DIRO** assessments, including the practical application of **TNFD** (specifically the **LEAP** approach).
* **Strong working knowledge** of **ESRS E4** (Biodiversity \& Ecosystems) and broader **CSRD** requirements, including an understanding of **double materiality** and nature\-related financial risk.
* **Experience supporting or advising** on **SBTN** target\-setting or equivalent science\-based approaches.
* **Deep familiarity** with leading frameworks, guidance, and disclosure standards, including **TNFD**, **EUDR**, **SBTN**, **ESRS/CSRD**, **AFi**, **GRI**, **ISSB**, and **CDP** (Forests/nature modules).
* **Proven ability** to assess value chain risks, land\-use change, and ecosystem impacts.

**Data, Analytics \& Modeling*** **Experience working with complex datasets** and successfully translating technical outputs into strategic, business\-relevant insights.
* **Familiarity with technical tools** such as **GIS** (ArcGIS, QGIS), geospatial data, natural capital assessment tools, and advanced **Excel\-based modeling**.

**Project Leadership \& Client Delivery*** **Proven ability to lead complex, multi\-stakeholder projects** and consistently deliver high\-quality outputs.
* **Strong capability to translate intricate technical frameworks** into actionable business strategies.
* **Experience working with multinational clients** across diverse sectors (e.g., FMCG, retail, agriculture, and finance).
* **Strong technical credibility** seamlessly combined with strategic and commercial acumen.

**Language Capabilities*** **Fluency in English** (both written and verbal) is strictly required for client delivery.
* **Fluency in Spanish** is a highly distinct advantage.
* **Additional language capabilities** are preferred to support global and regional engagements.

**Mindset \& Core Attributes*** **Collaborative and globally minded**, with the proven ability to work effectively across diverse cultures and time zones.
* **Passionate** about advancing **nature\-positive** outcomes and driving systemic change.
* **Detail\-oriented**, with a deep commitment to excellence and rigorous quality assurance.
* **Proactive, adaptable, and comfortable** operating in a fast\-evolving regulatory and market landscape.

  

### **Job Benefits**

  

* Work within a highly motivated team in an innovative and rapidly growing global company.
* Opportunity to have a direct impact and be a key part of the growth and development of the business and the team.
* Work solely on projects that have an impact on the sustainability and climate change goals/challenges for clients.
* Opportunity to work with, collaborate with and learn from sustainability SME’s who are passionate about the work they do and the impact Anthesis can have.
* Exposure to a wide range of clients and projects on a global basis.
* Competitive salary in line with, experience and skills.
* An opportunity to participate in the Anthesis Employee Participation Plan (EPP), an industry\-pioneering employee incentive plan that allows all employees to be rewarded for the growth in the equity value of Anthesis.
* Cooperative, supportive and open working atmosphere.

  

### **About Anthesis Group**


**Our commitment to building and maintaining a diverse workforce**  

  

Anthesis has clients across all industry sectors and supports some of the world’s largest multinationals such as Reckitt, Cisco, Tesco, The North Face, and Target. The company brings together 1,300\+ experts operating across 22 countries and 44 office locations with offices in Australia, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, China, Colombia, Finland, France, Germany, Hong Kong, Ireland, Italy, the Middle East, Netherlands, the Philippines, Singapore, South Africa, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, the UK, and the US.  

  

We encourage all employees to contribute their ideas, perspectives, and experiences to help us create an inclusive and equitable workplace. By embracing diversity and providing equal opportunities, we believe we can drive innovation, foster creativity, and achieve our shared goals. So, if you’re ready to be a part of something truly extraordinary, then we want you! Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender perception or identity, national origin, age, pregnancy, marital status, protected veteran status, or disability status.  

  

Together, we can continue to build a diverse and inclusive workforce where everyone has an equal opportunity to succeed and thrive.  

  

If you require any reasonable adjustments to be made to your application process, or need this job advert in a different format, just let us know and we’ll be happy to help.

title: Systems Engineer - Critical Infrastructure
description:
**Systems Engineer – Public Sector (Critical Infrastructure)****Role Overview:**Join Fortinet, a cybersecurity pioneer with over two decades of excellence, as we continue to shape the future of cybersecurity and redefine the intersection of networking and security. At Fortinet, our mission is to safeguard people, devices, and data everywhere. We are currently seeking a dynamic Systems Engineer – Public Sector (Critical Infrastructure) to support the growth of our rapidly expanding Public Sector business.
In this role, you will act as the key technical advisor and trusted partner for customers across the Public Sector, with a particular focus on critical national infrastructure (CNI) organisations—including energy, utilities, transportation, healthcare, government agencies, and other essential services. You will drive technical enablement, solution design, and architectural leadership to help these organisations strengthen resilience and secure their mission‑critical environments.  

**As a Systems Engineer – Public Sector (Critical Infrastructure), you will:**• Guide all technical aspects of the customer engagement process, from responding to RFIs to managing RFPs/RFQs and coordinating Proof of Concept activities with internal teams and strategic partners
• Interpret and translate customer technical requirements—often within highly regulated or operationally sensitive environments—into secure, scalable, and resilient solutions
• Serve as the primary technical contact for Public Sector and CNI customers, working closely with the aligned sales team to support account strategy and long‑term customer success
• Maintain deep knowledge of Fortinet’s portfolio, including solutions relevant to OT/ICS, Zero Trust, secure networking, cloud security, and SOC modernisation
• Stay informed on evolving cybersecurity threats, regulatory frameworks, and compliance requirements impacting Public Sector and critical infrastructure organisations
• Communicate the value of Fortinet’s solutions clearly and confidently through presentations, whiteboarding, technical workshops, documentation, and architectural discussions
• Manage multiple engagements efficiently while delivering a responsive, high‑quality experience to customers with mission‑critical operational needs
• Accurately maintain technical details and activity records in our CRM (Salesforce) for customer and prospect accounts  

**We Are Looking For:**An insightful, influential collaborator who thrives in complex, high‑stakes environments. You should apply if you have the following qualities:
• Strong understanding of cybersecurity technologies such as encryption, authentication, network security, intrusion prevention, malware protection, routing, switching, LAN/WAN
• Experience in a pre‑sales engineering role, ideally supporting Public Sector, critical infrastructure, or regulated industries
• Familiarity with OT/ICS environments, SCADA systems, or the unique security challenges of operational technology is a strong plus
• Ability to address complex challenges and design solutions that support secure, resilient, and compliant operations
• Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate complex technical topics for diverse audiences across technical, operational, and executive stakeholders
• Familiarity with technologies and protocols such as RADIUS, PKI, IKE, Certificates, L2TP, IPSEC, FIREWALL, 802\.1Q, MD5, SSH, SSL, SHA1, DES, 3DES
• CISSP certification is a plus; additional OT‑focused certifications (e.g., GICSP) are advantageous  

**Why Join Us:**At Fortinet, we embrace diversity and inclusivity. We encourage applications from diverse backgrounds and identities. Explore our welcoming work environment designed for a rewarding career journey with an attractive Total Rewards package to support your overall health and financial well‑being. Join us in delivering solutions that protect and empower more than 660,000 customers around the globe—including the organisations that keep society running.  

We will only notify shortlisted candidates. Fortinet will not entertain any unsolicited resumes; please refrain from sending them to any Fortinet employees or Fortinet email aliases. Should any agency submit resumes to Fortinet, these resumes—if considered—will be assumed to have been provided free of any related fees or charges.
company_description: Mission: Dedicated to Delivering Security Without Compromise

title: Field Service Engineer - Medical in Tuscany
description:
### **Why join Stryker?**


Looking for a place that values your unique talents? Discover Stryker's award\-winning culture.  

We are proud to offer you our total rewards package which includes bonuses, healthcare, insurance benefits, retirement programs, wellness programs, as well as service and performance awards – not to mention various social and recreational activities, all of which are location specific.### **Job description**


We are excited to be named one of the World’s Best Workplaces by Fortune Magazine!
  

We are proud to offer you our total rewards package which includes bonuses, healthcare, insurance benefits, retirement programs, wellness programs, as well as service and performance awards – not to mention various social and recreational activities, all of which are location specific.  

As Field Service Engineer you will be responsible for the repair and preventative maintenance of Stryker products in the Medical division, ensuring compliance with the quality system and manufacturer specifications. You will provide technical support and documentation to internal and external customers.

**Please apply with your CV in English.**

**Geographical area**: Tuscany

**Responsibilities**

* Repair and inspect Stryker electronic/mechanical products (hospital beds and stretchers, ambulance stretchers, defibrillators).
* Perform annual inspection and calibration according to the MDR, at the customer's site.
* Use software and technology tools to properly document and archive technical reports of performed activities and access technical information.
* Assist the Quality Department/customer with any product recalls, field safety alerts, and field action notices.
* Fulfil service contracts with scheduled maintenance.
* Provide technical training to internal and external personnel.
* Perform installation of Stryker systems at the customer's site.
* Perform software and hardware updates.
* Provide technical support to internal (sales team) and external customers
* Efficient and comprehensive documentation of service activities for internal and external use
* Ensure billing for services provided and contribute to achieving sales goals
* Ensure the traceability of all Stryker products in the field through reporting tools.
* Ensure excellent follow\-up on all customer issues.
* Schedule customer visits in collaboration with the sales team or customer service

**Working Conditions**

* Work will take place in a variety of settings, including the shop floor, hospitals, and various customer sites.
* Field Service Engineers will interact with key customers and stakeholders, including hospital staff, clinical engineering staff and managers, maintenance personnel, procurement, and purchasing personnel.
* Travel will be regular within the defined region, and travel expenses will be covered according to Stryker's standard travel policy.
* Attend regular meetings and team meetings.
* Attend team meetings and give presentations to encourage team development.
* This is a field\-based position, with 80% travel. The remainder of the time will be home\-based/working remotely.

**What We Offer:**

* **We grow talent.** At Stryker we offer great personal and internal career development for our employees, with the possibility to make both vertical and lateral position movement.
* **Team spirit \& engagement**. We create engaged and inclusive teams that encourage colleagues to share their diverse perspectives and opinions.
* **Competitive salary**. With us, you will receive a competitive salary package and benefits such as: Company van, phone \& laptop and full technical equipment
* **Recognition of your performance**. At our company, outstanding individual and cross\-functional team performance is rewarded. Ideas, projects, or other exceptional achievements can be submitted for various awards on a local and global level.
* **Promoting work\-life balance through flexible working hours**. We offer an appealing and flexible working hours model to accommodate individual life situations.

**Required**

* Bachelor's degree in electronic/mechanical/biomedical engineering, equivalent study in medical device technology, or at least one of the following: Electrical / Electronics / Telecommunications / Mechanical / Software Technological subjects
* Fluent Italian \& English \-Spoken and written fluency (technical and medical):
* Adequate computer skills (Microsoft Office, Outlook).
* Minimum 1\-3 years of experience in medical device repair or in the hospital and healthcare industry, combined with good mechanical skills.
* IT experience at an administrative and technical level.
* Ability to build relationships with internal and external customers to foster brand loyalty.
* Service orientation, persistence, and a positive mindset.
* Stress tolerance and confidence in your work.
* Self\-discipline and work organization.

**Preferred:**

* Knowledge of Oracle, SAP, or SalesForce is a plus.


At Stryker, we believe transparency helps candidates make confident decisions about their next career step. Compensation is an important part of that process, and we want to be clear about how pay is determined. The compensation information posted for this role may be presented as a salary range or a fixed amount depending on the role. In addition to base salary, this role may be eligible for bonus, along with Stryker’s comprehensive benefits package.  

If you’d like to learn more about the salary or the benefits associated with this role, your recruiter will be happy to walk you through the details as you progress through the hiring process.

**Italy Pay Ranges:** €35\.700 \- €59\.400 EUR Annual


Stryker is a global leader in medical technologies and, together with its customers, is driven to make healthcare better. The company offers innovative products and services in MedSurg, Neurotechnology, Orthopaedics and Spine that help improve patient and healthcare outcomes. Alongside its customers around the world, Stryker impacts more than 150 million patients annually.

title: Senior Director Brand and Content - 100% Remote - Europe
description:
**NOTE: This is a FULLY remote role, but the candidate must be within** **Europe** **to collaborate with their team, peers, and internal customers. You do not have to be in the specific country or city shown in this listing, but** **please only apply if you are physically based within** **Europe****.**


Trusted by 20,000\+ property managers worldwide, Hostaway is an industry leading, AI\-powered vacation rental management platform designed for professional short\-term rental operators. Hostaway brings everything together for greater efficiency and faster growth.

  

Profitable, high\-growth, and the first short\-term rental PMS unicorn . Join us at our most exciting stage yet! Learn more about our recent valuation and story here.


Hostaway is seeking a highly motivated Senior Director of Content \& Brand to join our team and drive our growth in the market.

### **About the role**


Hostaway is looking for a Senior Director of Brand and Content to build and lead the brand, content, and creative engine for our next stage of growth as a leading B2B SaaS platform for professional short\-term rental operators. This is a high\-impact SaaS marketing leadership role for someone who can shape our market narrative, elevate our category presence, and create content and creative programs that support awareness, pipeline, customer acquisition, and revenue growth.


You’ll build the function largely from the ground up, including the team, operating model, workflows, AI\-enabled production systems, and quality standards. This role will partner closely with Product Marketing, Demand Generation, Sales, Marketing Operations, and Product to ensure Hostaway’s brand, content, and creative output is aligned with SaaS GTM priorities, buyer journeys, product launches, demand generation, and measurable business outcomes.

### **Your mission**

* Build and lead a team that will own the modern content engine that produces high\-quality, high\-velocity editorial, thought leadership, and demand\-supporting content.
* Build and lead a small team that will define and own Hostaway's brand strategy, positioning, narrative architecture, and visual identity system for a fast\-growing global vertical SaaS company
* Build the in\-house Creative team from scratch including designers, copywriters, motion/video, and production talent.
* Across Content/Brand/Creative, utilize AI teammates who will drive efficiency while humans drive quality, designing workflows where generative tools handle research, drafting, variation, localization, and asset production, while humans own strategy, narrative, taste, and final quality.
* Partner closely with Product Marketing, Demand Generation, Sales, Marketing Operations and Product to align brand, content, and creative to support GTM priorities and drive revenue growth.
* Hire, mentor, and develop the brand, content, and creative team, making smart early bets on senior leaders, hands\-on makers, and hybrid AI\-native talent.
* Decide the right mix of in\-house team, agencies, freelancers, and AI\-augmented partners; manage vendor relationships and budget accordingly.
* Define KPIs across brand health, content performance, creative effectiveness, AI productivity gains, LLM/AI discoverability, and revenue contribution.
* 12\+ years of progressive experience across content, brand, and/or creative leadership, with significant experience in B2B SaaS marketing.
* 5\+ years of experience building and leading teams, including hiring senior talent and developing high\-performing creative or editorial professionals.
* Experience marketing to SMB or mid\-market SaaS buyers, ideally in a high\-velocity, transactional sales and marketing environment.
* Proven ability to build a SaaS marketing function or sub\-function from the ground up, including strategy, team structure, workflows, tools, and execution standards.
* Strong understanding of SaaS GTM motions, buyer journeys, product marketing, demand generation, lifecycle content, and sales enablement.
* Strong editorial instincts, storytelling ability, and creative judgment, with a clear sense of what makes B2B SaaS content and creative effective.
* Hands\-on fluency with AI tools for content, brand, and creative work, including a practical point of view on where AI improves quality, speed, and scale.
* Strong cross\-functional leadership skills, executive presence, and a track record of connecting brand, content, and creative work to measurable SaaS business outcomes such as pipeline, revenue, retention, and category authority.

### **What we offer**

* **Competitive Compensation:** We offer competitive pay based on market rates in the country of the applicant.
* **100% Remote:** Enjoy the freedom to work from anywhere within your country of residence—be it a co\-working space, your home office, or even your dining room table. The choice is yours. Just don’t ask to work in our office (we don’t have one).
* **Equity:** Every role in our company comes with valuable stock options in a fast\-growing and profitable company. This ensures we all share in the company’s success.
* **Values\-Driven Leadership:** Our Core Values are not just words we’ve written to make us feel good. We leverage them daily when making strategic and tactical decisions.
* **Professional Growth:** Our rapid growth offers unparalleled learning and development opportunities, along with a multitude of career advancement opportunities.
* **Annual Paid Leave:** The specific amounts vary by country and are aligned with country and/or contract\-specific norms.
* **Geographic Specific Benefits:** As an international employer, we offer different country\-specific benefits such as Health Insurance and Pensions in countries where these perks are customary. The specifics depend on the country of the applicant.
* **Dynamic Team Culture:** As a global company with team members in over 40 countries, our diverse and international culture fuels our innovation and creativity, providing a key pillar to our success (and making it a lot of fun to work here).


Thank you for your interest. If you apply for this role, you will receive an email from our Talent Acquisition team after your application has been reviewed alongside the qualifications for this role and the qualifications of others who have applied.
